changes.reason: Distinct high-value iPhone/iPad photo-loss symptom cluster: missing, hidden, shared-library, account/sync-view, and unable-to-upload branches are not covered as the primary intent by existing canonical articles.

queries: 已隐藏 最近删除 共享图库
iCloud 照片无法同步 无法上传
canonicalReview.notes: Reviewed all 77 canonical article IDs/titles/summaries/symptoms/aliases/devices/platforms/errorMessages/keywords and full-text adjacent matches. Existing iCloud sync article primarily covers paused/sync failure; the new article's primary intent is missing or invisible photos/videos and systematically distinguishes Recently Deleted, Hidden, Shared Library, account/view mismatch, and Unable to Upload. No same-intent canonical exists.
